# Cortex Company Brain

> Cortex is a hosted, multi-tenant company-brain SaaS. It gives each organization scoped brains, sources, team invites, invite delivery outbox records, OAuth agent clients, skills, runtime manifests, Composio ingestion, and MCP access through one Cortex-branded control plane.

Repo: https://github.com/Versatly/CortexBrain

## SaaS entry points

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/README.md): Cortex product model, hosted quick start, CLI commands, UI tabs, and agent parity table.
- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/AGENTS.md): Agent operating protocol for the Cortex SaaS: signup, onboarding, invites, runtime install, and trust boundary.
- [INSTALL_FOR_AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/INSTALL_FOR_AGENTS.md): Hosted tenant onboarding guide for agents connecting a company to Cortex, including invite delivery outbox and claim/result expectations.
- [docs/tutorials/company-brain.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/tutorials/company-brain.md): Company-brain walkthrough: organizations, brains, sources, scoped agents, team invites, and MCP OAuth.
- [docs/CORTEX_AGENT_RUNTIME.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/CORTEX_AGENT_RUNTIME.md): Agent runtime contract for Cortex SaaS: tenant operations, runtime manifests, source scoping, skills, integrations, and MCP parity.
- [docs/CORTEX_PRODUCT_SPEC.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/CORTEX_PRODUCT_SPEC.md): Cortex product spec covering first-class objects, required journeys, console tabs, agent parity, deployment requirements, and demo gates.

## Deployment and runtime

- [docs/deploy/multi-tenant-saas.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/deploy/multi-tenant-saas.md): Production SaaS deployment model: Supabase, Railway/Docker, admin console, signup, tenant isolation, and operations.
- [docs/deploy/saas-runtime-packaging.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/deploy/saas-runtime-packaging.md): Runtime packaging contract for agents: onboarding URLs, runtime manifests, `cortex connect`, and client setup.
- [docs/guides/agent-to-cortex.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/guides/agent-to-cortex.md): How agent runtimes should call Cortex through hosted MCP, OAuth clients, source scoping, skill ids, and operator-only shell jobs.
- [docs/mcp/DEPLOY.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/mcp/DEPLOY.md): Hosted HTTP MCP deployment with OAuth 2.1, scoped clients, runtime manifests, and client connection patterns.
- [docs/operations/headless-install.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/operations/headless-install.md): Headless deployment guide for hosted Cortex in Docker, Railway, CI, or other server environments.
- [.env.saas.example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/.env.saas.example): Production-shaped environment template using Cortex-branded variables.

## Product model

- [docs/architecture/brains-and-sources.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/architecture/brains-and-sources.md): Decision model for organizations, brains, sources, sub-team boundaries, and cross-brain ownership.
- [docs/CORTEX_RECOMMENDED_SCHEMA.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/CORTEX_RECOMMENDED_SCHEMA.md): Recommended tenant schema for company brains: sources, starter types, link verbs, onboarding flow, and schema completion criteria.
- [docs/architecture/topologies.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/architecture/topologies.md): Topology guidance for single-brain, multi-source, and multi-brain company deployments.
- [docs/integrations/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/integrations/README.md): Integration recipe model and ingestion surface, including third-party connector setup.

## Console UI

- [docs/deploy/v0-ui-mvp-prompt.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/deploy/v0-ui-mvp-prompt.md): V0 prompt and implementation contract for the Next.js App Router admin console with shadcn components.

## Verification

- [docs/CORTEX_VERIFY.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/docs/CORTEX_VERIFY.md): Hosted Cortex verification runbook for SaaS smoke, runtime manifest, onboarding URLs, admin walkthrough, agent parity, and demo gates.
- [scripts/saas-live-smoke.ts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/scripts/saas-live-smoke.ts): End-to-end hosted SaaS smoke: signup, invite delivery outbox claim/result, invite, source, skill policy, agent OAuth, Composio webhook, token, and MCP tools.
- [test/saas-live-smoke.test.ts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Versatly/CortexBrain/main/test/saas-live-smoke.test.ts): Unit coverage for the live smoke harness and its failure reporting.

## Operational tips

- `cortex connect '<onboarding-url>' --client-secret '<one-time-secret>'` - connect an invited agent or owner runtime.
- `cortex runtime install cursor --manifest-url https://<tenant-host>/runtime-manifest.json` - configure a runtime without embedding secrets.
- `bun run smoke:saas-live -- --json` - verify signup, invite delivery outbox claim/result, billing reconciliation, invites, Composio ingestion, OAuth token exchange, and MCP tools on a hosted tenant.
- `cortex serve --http --public-url https://<tenant-host>` - run the hosted HTTP MCP server for a tenant brain.
